text_lines: Purchase exactly 100 replacement control modules. Consider only approved
vendors quoting in USD that can deliver within seven calendar days. For each
eligible vendor, use its current live quote when one is available; otherwise
use its standard catalog price. Select the one vendor with the lowest authoritative unit price.
`total_price_usd`; the total is quantity 100 multiplied by the selected unit
price. It must also identify the selected `vendor_id`, `vendor_name`,
A-17,Use the current live quote instead of the standard catalog price when available.

input.original: Complete the procurement task using only the listed tools and their observations.
input.zh_summary: 在相同附件、工具、限流场景、模型与预算下完成采购决策并提交可验证证据。

shared_contract.description: CASE_REPLAY_SHARED_CONTRACT: Both cells use the same procurement request, requirements.md, vendors.csv, amendments.csv, rate_limit fixture, deterministic verifier, model identity, aggregate budget, and concrete tool implementations. The shared tools are read_file, list_resources, fetch_resource, write_output, wait_or_advance, and finish, with the argument and observation semantics stated above. Local attachments must be read only with read_file. Remote resources must be discovered with list_resources before fetch_resource. Only the existing ReAct loop versus controlled workflow loop may differ.

cases.teaching_summary_zh: 该演示对只改变控制循环的两条真实轨迹进行逐步公开投影。
